name: Galloping Horses-- Vegetarian Version
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Fresh shiitake mushrooms, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a blender or mortar & pestle, blend garlic, cilantro roots, sake, and peppercorns into a paste.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add the paste and stir-fry until aromatic (a few seconds).
3. Add shiitake mushrooms and stir-fry until cooked.
4. Stir in all seasonings and fry until sugar is fully blended into the mixture. Remove from heat and let cool.
5. Slice pineapple into ½-inch rings, then cut each ring into ½-inch by 1 ½-inch pieces.
6. Place a small amount of cooled stir-fry mixture on each pineapple piece.
7. Decorate each "horse" with a few chili slivers and a cilantro leaf.
VARIATION: Replace the pineapple with navel oranges or firm avocado slices.
